about.title: Nordic relaxation for body and soul all year round…
about.paragraph1: We invite you to relax in Scandinavian-style duplex apartments near Rubikiai Lake in Anykščiai district. Here you will enjoy a private Jacuzzi, from which you can watch the local residents - fallow deer. You can admire and feed them, and they will reward you with unforgettable moments, soul therapy and peace...
about.paragraph2: For those seeking complete privacy - a luxurious Lake House for two in the embrace of nature, just 10 steps from the lake and forest…
about.paragraph3: Complement your stay with lake activities - peaceful boat or pedal boat rides, or perhaps memorable kayak adventures...
about.ezeroNamelisDesc: A charming, separate holiday cottage on the lakeshore – The perfect escape with stunning sunsets, starry nights and peaceful mornings...
about.dupleksoApartamentaiDesc: Two stylish apartments offering Scandinavian comfort and modern amenities in the company of deer…

ezeroNamelis.title: Lake House
ezeroNamelis.subtitle: Private and Romantic Lake House for Two
ezeroNamelis.tagline: A private and romantic cottage for two
ezeroNamelis.feature2: Luxurious jacuzzi on the terrace with lake views
ezeroNamelis.feature4: The apartment has everything two people might need
ezeroNamelis.feature6: During the warm season you can also enjoy outdoor facilities - barbecue and fire pit

description.p1: Private and Romantic Lake House for two - just 10 steps from the lake and forest.
description.p3: Luxurious jacuzzi on the terrace with a view of Rubikiai Lake and unforgettable sunsets...
description.p5: In the apartment you will find everything you might need: a fully equipped kitchen, lounge area, bathroom, bedroom with a comfortable large double bed, wifi, TV, Kamado Picnic grill on the terrace, towels, bed linen, bathrobes, etc....
description.p6: Heated floors for your comfort, heat pump to ensure warm evenings, air conditioning to cool down during hot summer...
description.p7: During the warm season you can also enjoy the nearby large private beach. We offer kayak, pedal boat or boat rental, which you can use to explore and discover up to 16 Rubikiai Lake islands or accompany the most beautiful red sunsets.

dupleksas.title: Duplex Apartments
dupleksas.subtitle: Experience magical moments by the Rubikiai lake.

description.p1: Relax in luxurious duplex apartments in Anykščiai district by Rubikiai Lake surrounded by nature.
description.p2: The bright, classic Scandinavian-style duplex is located just 100m from Rubikiai Lake.
description.p3: The duplex is unique in that it borders a 2ha fallow deer territory (only a transparent fence separates you). The duplex consists of two 40m2 apartments, with separate entrances, separate terraces and private whirlpool SPA baths (Jacuzzi).
description.p4: One duplex apartment can accommodate up to 4 people, and when booking the entire duplex (both apartments) up to 8 people. Here you will find everything you might need for relaxation: a fully equipped kitchen, lounge area, bathroom, bedroom (2 single and 1 double beds), wifi, TV, towels, bed linen, bathrobes, etc.
description.p5: Heated floors for your comfort, heat pump to ensure warm evenings, a stove for romantic coziness, air conditioning to cool down during hot summer...
description.p6: During the warm season, you can also enjoy the nearby large private beach. We offer kayak, pedal boat or boat rental, which you can use to explore and discover up to 16 Rubikiai Lake islands or accompany the most beautiful red sunsets.

reservations.title: Reservations
reservations.rule1: Apartments are rented for quiet relaxation only.
reservations.rule2: Minors are only accepted from the age of 16 or by prior arrangement
reservations.rule3: For the safety of the reindeer - pets are not allowed
reservations.rule4: By making a reservation, you confirm that you have read our house rules and reservation terms.
reservations.rule5: Check-in time is from 16:00. Check-out time is until 12:00 in Lake House and 11:00 in Duplex Apartments.
reservations.viewAllRules: You can view all rules on our
reservations.payment1: When reserving, you pay a booking deposit equal to one night's stay. The remaining amount is paid upon arrival.
reservations.payment2: If an error occurs in the booking system that makes the service unavailable or results in an unreasonably low price, we will inform you as soon as possible and the reservation will be canceled, rescheduled, or your deposit will be refunded.
reservations.payment3: You may change the reservation date once free of charge no later than 7 days before arrival. The reservation deposit is non-refundable. Multiple date changes are charged at the amount of 20€.

form.noResults: No results. Select dates or change amount of guests and click "Search".

form.contactForPricing: Contact us for exact pricing or check the price for each night above.
form.calendarTip: Tip: Navigate dates using "Previous" and "Next" buttons. Days marked with ✓ are available to book.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about your stay at our retreat.
faq.q1: What are the check-in and check-out times?
faq.a1: Check-in time is from 16:00 PM. Check-out time is until 12:00 in Lake House and 11:00 in Duplex Apartments.
faq.a2: For the safety and tranquility of the fallow deer, pets are not allowed. If you arrive with a pet, you will be asked to leave, and the payment will not be refunded.
faq.q3: Can I feed the fallow deer?
faq.a3: You can only feed the fallow deer with fruits and vegetables, which you can either bring yourself or purchase in a basket for a symbolic price upon arrival.
faq.q4: Can I cancel my reservation and get a refund?
faq.a4: You may change the reservation date once free of charge no later than 7 days before arrival. The reservation deposit is non-refundable. Multiple date changes are charged at the amount of 20€.
faq.q5: Is there Wi-Fi available in the apartments?
faq.a5: Yes, all our apartments offer free and stable Wi-Fi connectivity for all our guests.
faq.a6: Yes, they are valid for 1 year from purchase. You can buy them at www.rubikiailux.lt in coupons section or info@rubikiailux.lt
faq.q7: Is the jacuzzi at an additional charge?
faq.a7: Yes. Once the jacuzzi service is reserved, you can enjoy it from 18:00 to 24:00. All jacuzzis are electric, with lounge seats and massage jets...

houseRules.title: House Rules
houseRules.subtitle: House Rules — Please read carefully before booking
houseRules.pageSubtitle: House Rules — Please read carefully to ensure a pleasant stay
houseRules.intro: The Client must ensure that all guests arriving with him/her to the estate are familiarized with and comply with the internal rules. If the Client or any of the guests arriving with the Client do not comply with the internal rules, the Client is personally responsible for any consequences in accordance with the procedure established by legal acts.
houseRules.ezeroNamelis:
Check-in time starts at 4:00 PM, check-out time ends at 12:00 PM the next day.

Upon arrival, you need to pay the remaining reservation amount.

Arriving with pets is strictly prohibited. If you arrive with a pet, you will be asked to leave. Payment will not be refunded.

Do not move furniture or relocate items to places not intended for them. Maintain order and cleanliness in the apartments. Everything is in ideal condition and we would like to keep it that way.

Please take care of our property. If inventory is broken, smashed or otherwise damaged - you must inform and settle immediately. If such damage is caused by minor children, their parents or guardians are financially responsible, and if they refuse, the Client compensates in all cases.

If the Client arrives with minor children - must take care of them, i.e. not leave them unsupervised, and is fully responsible for their safety and fully financially responsible for damage caused by children on the estate (broken, damaged inventory, property).

We accept guests only for quiet relaxation, so please respect the peace of others, quiet hours from 12:00 AM to 9:00 AM.

SMOKING INDOORS IS PROHIBITED. When smoking outside, dispose of cigarette butts only in designated containers on the terrace.

Do not cut on tables or countertops, use cutting boards.

Use baking paper or foil in the oven.

Use electrical appliances in compliance with safety requirements, do not allow children to use them. Do not leave switched-on electrical appliances unattended. Please turn off all lights and turn off water taps before leaving the apartments.

Blankets, towels and other room inventory cannot be used at the beach or outdoor picnics.

---JACUZZI---

If the jacuzzi service has not been paid for, using it is strictly prohibited!

Jacuzzi usage time is from 6:00 PM to 12:00 AM.

The jacuzzi is not intended for washing, so before using it, we recommend taking a shower!

Do not wear jewelry and accessories (rings, bracelets, chains, watches...) due to the possibility of losing them and damaging the jacuzzi pumps... you will have to cover the repair costs.

It is prohibited to use the jacuzzi when covered with any creams or oils.

Do not eat or drink in the whirlpool bath and do not pour any liquids into it, neither shampoo, soap... - this way you can damage the filtration system and pumps and will have to cover the repair costs.

It is prohibited to open the jacuzzi cover when using the barbecue grill.

After each use of the whirlpool bath, you MUST close the cover.
houseRules.dupleksas:
Check-in time starts at 4:00 PM, check-out time ends at 11:00 AM the next day.

Upon arrival, you need to pay the remaining reservation amount.

Arriving with pets is strictly prohibited. If you arrive with a pet, you will be asked to leave. Payment will not be refunded.

Do not move furniture or relocate items to places not intended for them. Maintain order and cleanliness in the apartments. Everything is in ideal condition and we would like to keep it that way.

Please take care of our property. If inventory is broken, smashed or otherwise damaged - you must inform and settle immediately. If such damage is caused by minor children, their parents or guardians are financially responsible, and if they refuse, the Client compensates in all cases.

If the Client or persons arriving with him/her arrive with minor children - must take care of them, i.e. not leave them unsupervised, and are fully responsible for their safety and fully financially responsible for damage caused by children on the estate (broken, damaged inventory, property).

We accept guests only for quiet relaxation, so please respect the peace of others, quiet hours from 12:00 AM to 9:00 AM.

SMOKING INDOORS IS PROHIBITED. When smoking outside, dispose of cigarette butts only in designated containers on the terrace.

Do not cut on tables or countertops, use cutting boards.

Use baking paper or foil in the oven.

Use electrical appliances in compliance with safety requirements, do not allow children to use them. Do not leave switched-on electrical appliances unattended. Please turn off all lights and turn off water taps before leaving the apartments.

The stove in the room can only be lit with the permission of the estate owner and after listening to instructions.

Do not place items on the stove, do not burn household waste in the stove.

Maintain a safe distance from the hot stove and do not leave it burning unattended.

Blankets, towels and other room inventory cannot be used at the beach or outdoor picnics.

Do not feed fallow deer with other food, only fruits or vegetables.

---JACUZZI---

If the jacuzzi service has not been paid for, using it is strictly prohibited!

Jacuzzi usage time is from 6:00 PM to 12:00 AM.

The jacuzzi is not intended for washing, so before using it, we recommend taking a shower!

Jumping into and out of the Jacuzzi is strictly prohibited.

Do not wear jewelry and accessories (rings, bracelets, chains, watches...) due to the possibility of losing them and damaging the jacuzzi pumps... you will have to cover the repair costs.

It is prohibited to use the jacuzzi when covered with any creams or oils.

Do not eat or drink in the whirlpool bath and do not pour any liquids into it, neither shampoo, soap... - this way you can damage the filtration system and pumps and will have to cover the repair costs.

It is prohibited to open the jacuzzi cover when using the barbecue grill.

After each use of the whirlpool bath, you MUST close the cover.
houseRules.warningText: Rubikiai LUX staff has the right to evict persons from the apartments before the specified term (without refund), who do not comply with and grossly violate the internal rules and behavior rules, as well as demand compensation for damage and losses in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Lithuania.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.content:
GENERAL INFORMATION
Rubikiai Lux with this privacy policy (hereinafter - Privacy Policy) defines the conditions that must be followed by all visitors (hereinafter - Visitors) of the website www.Rubikiailux.lt (hereinafter - Website). All listed conditions apply each time the Visitor uses Rubikiai Lux created content, purchases a service/product or sends a request, regardless of whether using a computer, tablet, phone, or other devices.

It is considered that the Visitor familiarizes themselves with and confirms their consent to comply with the Privacy Policy when they visit the Website, connect to the Website and/or purchase a product and/or service sold on the Website. A Visitor who does not agree with any provision of the Privacy Policy does not confirm their consent and loses the right to visit the Website, connect and use all and/or any of the services provided on the Website.

Persons under 16 years of age may not provide any personal data through our website. If you are a person under 16 years of age, you must obtain the consent of your parents or other legal guardians before submitting personal information.

Rubikiai Lux (hereinafter - Data Controller) with this privacy policy (hereinafter - Privacy Policy) establishes the conditions for processing personal data when using the website managed by the Data Controller. The conditions set by the Privacy Policy apply each time the Visitor wants to access the content and/or service provided by the Data Controller, regardless of what device (computer, mobile phone, tablet, television, etc.) the Visitor uses.

This Policy does not apply when the Visitor browses other companies' websites or uses third-party services while visiting the Rubikiai Lux website.

When processing personal data, we are guided by the requirements of the European Union Data Protection Regulation No. 2016/679, the Law of the Republic of Lithuania on Legal Protection of Personal Data, the Law of the Republic of Lithuania on Electronic Communications, other related legal acts and instructions of supervisory authorities.


DATA CONTROLLER DETAILS:
Tel.: +370 646 32 972

Email: info@rubikiailux.lt

​
WHAT INFORMATION ABOUT THE VISITOR IS COLLECTED?
Directly provided information:

First name
Last name
Date of birth
Email address
Phone number


INFORMATION ON HOW THE VISITOR USES OUR WEBSITE:
If the Visitor visits the Data Controller's website, the Data Controller also collects information that reveals the specifics of using the company's services or automatically generates visit statistics. More about this in the "Cookies" section.

INFORMATION FROM THIRD PARTIES:
When the Visitor logs in through social network accounts, such as "Facebook", "Gmail" etc., the information obtained may be linked to other information we receive when the Visitor visits our website.

OTHER INFORMATION WE COLLECT:
Information about the Visitor's computer and about the Visitor's visits and use of this Website, including IP address, time and date of connection to the Website;

Any other information that the Visitor may provide to the Data Controller at any time using the Data Controller's Website and provided services.

 
VISITOR'S RIGHTS:
A Visitor who has agreed to the terms of this privacy policy has the following rights:

To know and be informed about their processed personal data;
To familiarize themselves with the data processing policy;
To suspend their data processing actions (except storage);
To object to their data being processed or used for direct marketing purposes, including profiling to the extent it is related to direct marketing.

WHEN DO WE USE THE VISITOR'S PROVIDED INFORMATION?
The Visitor's provided personal information may be used:

to allow use of the rubikiailux.lt website and services provided therein.

for direct marketing purposes, with the Visitor's consent (sending newsletters, sending individual announcements about promotions and special offers, organizing surveys to find out opinions about provided services)*

for direct marketing purposes - profiling, in order to offer the Visitor individually tailored offers and services.*

for sending invoices and reports;

for payment of service (shopping cart) through the selected external banking service provider;

analyzing how many and how people use our internet services, in order to improve the quality and content of provided services.

The Visitor has the right to withdraw their consent to use their data for marketing purposes at any time.

 
TO WHOM DO WE DISCLOSE THE VISITOR'S INFORMATION?
We undertake not to transfer the Visitor's personal data to any unrelated third parties, except:

If the visitor agrees to disclose their personal data and confirms this in writing.

When providing services - to our partners when ordering services. The Data Controller will provide service providers only as much of the Visitor's personal information as will be necessary to perform a specific service.

To law enforcement authorities in accordance with the procedure provided for in the legal acts of the Republic of Lithuania

 
HOW LONG IS THE VISITOR'S DATA STORED?
Rubikiai Lux stores the Visitor's personal data no longer than required by data processing purposes or provided for by legal acts, if they establish a longer data storage period. Personal data is usually stored as long as legitimate claims may arise from contractual relations or as necessary to implement and protect the legitimate interests of Rubikiai Lux. Unnecessary personal data is destroyed. When providing electronic services, Rubikiai Lux processes traffic data only as much as necessary to ensure proper service provision, except in cases provided for in legal acts.

 
NEWSLETTERS
When subscribing to the newsletter, Rubikiai Lux will use the Visitor's email address based on the Visitor's consent, which the Visitor can withdraw at any time. We may transfer the Visitor's email address to third parties providing specialized services only to send you the Rubikiai Lux newsletter.

After sending the newsletter, Rubikiai Lux may collect statistical data about the Visitor's behavior, for example, whether the visitor opened the email, which links they clicked.

We will process the Visitor's email address for newsletter sending purposes until the Visitor refuses to receive Rubikiai Lux offers. You can unsubscribe from Rubikiai Lux newsletters by clicking the appropriate link at the bottom of the newsletter or by other methods specified in this policy.

 
INFORMATION PROVIDED TO THIRD PARTIES
The Data Controller's website may also contain advertising messages, links to third-party websites and their services - the data controller does not control this. The Data Controller is not responsible for the security and privacy of information collected by third parties. The Visitor must read the privacy provisions applicable to third-party websites and services they use.

 
FINAL PROVISIONS
The Data Controller has the right to partially or completely change the Policy.

Additions or changes to the Privacy Policy take effect from the day of their publication on the Website.

If after the addition or change to the Policy the Visitor continues to use the Website and its provided services, and confirms their consent, it is considered that the Visitor agrees with these additions and/or changes.

This Policy is reviewed no less than once every 2 (two) years and, if necessary, updated. 


USE OF COOKIES
When visiting the data controller's website, the visitor must be provided with content that meets their needs. This process requires cookies - information elements that automatically save the Visitor's data when browsing the data controller's website. They help save the page visit history, adapt it according to content, also allow monitoring the duration of the website visit, collecting statistical information about the number of visitors and monitoring smooth website operation.

In order to analyze the use of the Website, Rubikiai Lux company uses Google Analytics and other similar tools. These tools generate statistics and other information about Website usage based on cookies stored on users' computers. Information collected about Website visits is used to create reports about Website usage.


DISPUTE RESOLUTION
Disputes not in court are examined in accordance with the procedure established by the Consumer Rights Protection Law of the Republic of Lithuania at the State Consumer Rights Protection Service, address Vilniaus g. 25, 01402 Vilnius, email tarnyba@vvtat.lt, tel. (8 5) 262 67 51, fax (8 5) 279 1466, website www.vvtat.lt. Electronically, you can submit a request through the EGS platform http://ec.europa.eu/odr/
